hero.name: Nhlanhla Junior Malaza
hero.title: Software Developer, DevOps Engineer & AI Integrations Specialist
hero.subtitle: A passionate software developer, willing to learn and adapt to any software environment. I am always striving to improve myself and my skills. I enjoy working with others and within a team.

services.label: What I Do
services.heading: Services &
services.subheading: A full range of development services to bring your ideas to life with cutting-edge technology.
services.cta_sub: Have a project in mind? Let's talk.
services.item_0_desc: Building responsive, performant web applications using modern frameworks like React, Next.js, and Vue.js.
services.item_1_desc: Creating cross-platform mobile apps with React Native and Flutter for iOS and Android.
services.item_2_desc: Designing and deploying scalable cloud infrastructure on AWS, GCP, and Azure.
services.item_3_desc: Integrating AI and machine learning capabilities into applications to automate workflows and deliver intelligent user experiences.
services.item_4_desc: Building robust APIs, microservices, and database architectures for enterprise applications.
services.item_5_desc: Implementing automated pipelines, containerization, and infrastructure as code.

newsletter.heading: Subscribe to My Newsletter
newsletter.subheading: Get the latest updates on web development, tech insights, and exclusive content delivered straight to your inbox. No spam, unsubscribe anytime.
newsletter.disclaimer: By subscribing, you agree to receive emails from me. You can unsubscribe at any time.
